title: Audi RS6 Avant Coloring Page

seoDescription: Download and print this medium Audi RS6 Avant coloring sheet. High-resolution free printable PDF showing a high-performance sports wagon.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: The Audi RS6 Avant is a high-performance luxury wagon powered by a twin-turbo V8 engine producing over 590 horsepower.
It features Audi's famous Quattro all-wheel-drive system, accelerating from 0 to 60 mph in just 3.5 seconds.
It combines supercar performance with the practical cargo space of a family estate wagon.
